channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Crypto markets stall as oil surges past $100 on Strait of Hormuz blockade
item.description: Bitcoin and ether retreated Monday as tensions in the Middle East triggered a spike in crude oil, forcing traders into defensive derivatives positioning.

item.title: The one metric investors are overlooking in Michael Saylor’s Strategy
item.description: Increased preferred-equity issuance and surging STRC trading volumes are reshaping how Strategy's common stock trades.

item.title: StarkWare cuts jobs in reorganization as Starknet revenue plunges 99% from peak
item.description: Days after unveiling a quantum-safe bitcoin method, a StarkWare researcher was tapped to lead a new applications unit as Layer-2 revenue dries up.

item.title: Hyperbridge attacker mints 1B bridged Polkadot tokens in $237K exploit
item.description: A Hyperbridge exploit let an attacker mint 1 billion bridged Polkadot tokens on Ethereum and cash out about $237,000, reviving debate over bridge security.

item.title: Oil price surges 8% on Iran tensions: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin preserved $70,000 at the weekly close as markets began reacting to a breakdown in US-Iran negotiations and blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Clarity Act returns to U.S. Senate, Bank earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting April 13.

item.title: Bitcoin hit by $20 million-an-hour selling pressure above $70,000
item.description: Bitcoin has once again seen heavy profit-taking above $70,000, according to Glassnode.

item.title: We’re aware of an issue affecting @hyperbridge's Ethereum gateway contract. The exploit only affects DOT on Ethereum that is bridged through Hyperbridge and does not affect DOT in the Polkadot ecosystem, or DOT bridged through other bridges. Polkadot, i - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1wTXYwdHN1ajNDcF9TUUpVYV9XaXhHZm85elhfMEp3V3piQ0NTS250Q1kzaWZvN3FRdmRuQVdFOVB3Z3hlaUJ1QTJab3BfVk5ETXlfajZCUDBYRmVacVE?oc=5" target="_blank">We’re aware of an issue affecting @hype…

item.title: Attacker mints $1 billion Polkadot tokens on Ethereum, ends up stealing just $250,000
item.description: A forged cross-chain message bypassed state proof validation on the bridge contract, granting admin control over the bridged DOT token and allowing the attacker to mint and dump the entire supply for $237,000.

item.title: Alameda moves $16 million in Solana's SOL token for possible creditor distribution
item.description: Alameda unstakes $16 million worth of Solana's SOL token, according to Arkham.

item.title: Aave passes landmark vote ending months-long fight over protocol revenue control
item.description: The proposal directs 100% of application and product revenue back to AAVE token holders, resolving a governance dispute that began when swap fees were quietly redirected away from the DAO treasury in late 2025.

item.title: TRUMP whales load up as Mar-a-Lago luncheon approaches
item.description: Large holders are accumulating TRUMP ahead of a Mar-a-Lago event for top token holders, even as the memecoin trades down over 30% since March.

item.title: Bank of Korea floats crypto ‘circuit breakers’ after Bithumb blunder
item.description: Bithumb accidentally sent customers 620,000 Bitcoin instead of 620,000 Korean won in February. The Bank of Korea wants lawmakers to make it so it doesn't happen again.

item.title: Institutions are in a crypto bull market as retail sits out: Exodus CEO
item.description: Almost everyone has a hard time paying their bills every month, said crypto YouTuber Michaël van de Poppe, on why retail may be absent this cycle.

item.title: Musician loses $420K Bitcoin ‘retirement fund’ via fake Ledger app
item.description: Blockchain sleuth ZachXBT said Garrett Dutton’s 5.9 Bitcoin has already been sent to deposit addresses associated with KuCoin.

item.title: WLFI threatens legal action against Justin Sun after he accuses Trump-linked project of deceptive DeFi deals
item.description: Trump-backed crypto project says it has ‘contracts’ and ‘evidence’ after Sun accused it of exploiting users.

item.title: Bitcoin hits a wall – the chart just challenged the $88,000 bull case
item.description: The price action is sending a clear warning signal that analysts' optimism may be running ahead of itself.

item.title: 🚨 ALERT: Bridged $DOT on Ethereum has been exploited. An attacker minted 1B $DOT and dumped it all in a single transaction for 108.2 $ETH ($237K). - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBCTS14Y0pCeExCa3Q3QnhhNEstOF9scHBoaHRneXY5MmRESUFYZUctTWdFbjY5RG8xR3g5S2c5dF96UmFwallWQzFHYU1kOElPa2FQUkhLekJkSWZOZnFabEd6Umc?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 ALERT: Bridged $DOT on Ether…

item.title: Just In: Hackers minted 1 billion DOT tokens on the Ethereum mainnet and then sold them off. According to Certik, the attack was primarily due to a Hyperbridge gateway vulnerability, which allowed attackers to forge messages and manipulate the administrato - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE8zeFZjY1MySXFBbEhsdFd3aTB2U3JHUlBldk5YQzhpc00ybHdvcFIwdWE5YTF5MjhFUmdkZ2NFNFc1RUl3VGExeDZvLWtJMzVkeW0wY1dobUozVTlaTW1MRDhTOA?oc=5" target="_blank">Just In: Hackers minted 1 billio…

item.title: Strategy signals another bitcoin buy as company needs just 2% annual BTC growth to cover dividends
item.description: The company bought nearly three times more bitcoin than miners produced in March and is signaling it isn't done, even as its holdings remain billions underwater.

item.title: Bitcoin mining and AI may be on opposite decentralization paths: Researcher
item.description: Bitcoin mining is becoming more centralized while AI could move the opposite way, driven by edge computing and open-source models.

item.title: Aave DAO approves $25M funding grant, token allocation for Aave Labs
item.description: The vote passed with nearly 75% in favor. Other elements of the framework, including the growth and development grants, will have separate governance proposals.

item.title: EU central bank backs plan for crypto supervision under EU markets watchdog
item.description: The European Central Bank has boosted a proposal to take away EU member states' regulatory oversight of crypto and hand it to the European Union’s market regulator.

item.title: Researchers discover malicious AI agent routers that can steal crypto
item.description: 26 LLM routers are “secretly injecting malicious tool calls and stealing creds,” warns researcher Chaofan Shou.

item.title: Bitcoin dips to $70.6K, oil rises after US announces Hormuz blockade
item.description: US President Donald Trump said Iran did not want to compromise its nuclear weapons program, stating it was the only issue that “really mattered.”

item.title: Standard Chartered’s Geoffrey Kendrick explains his $40,000 ETH price target by 2030 “I think a lot of [tradfi activity] happens on Ethereum Layer 1. I think about how BlackRock rolled out BUIDL, for example — all on layer 1 Ethereum… which I think is a more l - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFA4M1NyRndvWFE4RnZIY0dudjMzN0lldDZDWm04cWQtZGd3SDN4SVp3Z0t6OFgxTkJ0Nlh5V1RqNXV0dm9paGQ1RWFxOEZoUF81NmZac29zdUR1WFlMNXdEZnlWVTdwZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Standard Chartered’s Geoffre…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: BTC recovery fragile, Iran war fallout to ‘dominate’ markets in 2026: Analyst
item.description: Fallout from the Iran war will likely weigh on markets for much of 2026, dashing hopes of rate cuts until Q3 by the earliest, the Coin Bureau's Nic Puckrin said.

item.title: Bitcoin price falls under $71K as US-Iran war tensions spark sell-off
item.description: Bitcoin price sold off as negotiations to end the US-Iran war broke down and the Strait of Hormuz returned to the spotlight.

item.title: Justin Sun calls out WLFI; platform threatens lawsuit in response
item.description: Sun criticized the WLFI platform over long token lockup periods and withholding key information from voters.

item.title: Our BTC Breakeven ARR is ~2.05%. If Bitcoin grows faster than that over time, we can cover our dividends indefinitely without issuing new $MSTR shares. Track it in real time on our site. $STRC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1fTXZnVG1SYlFpaDhWalpzMTB1UWZuNkU4b0tSOTVyeVhWOEhvaXRkdU5TQlc1RGtkTmo3UWZnSXVTS1habkdsOXFNRlhmSEQ1OVhwdHV2dmtLcEU?oc=5" target="_blank">Our BTC Breakeven ARR is ~2.05%. If Bitcoin…

item.title: CFTC Chair Mike Selig argues for agency's 'exclusive regulatory authority' in prediction markets fight: State of Crypto
item.description: Selig said states do not have the ability to police prediction market providers, echoing his agency's stance as it pursues court cases to cement its authority.

item.title: DeFi’s shakeout is a stress test, not a death sentence
item.description: Novozhenov argues that despite lingering governance, security and regulatory hurdles that have shuttered several protocols, DeFi remains resilient.

item.title: Want Claude Opus AI on Your Potato PC? This Is Your Next-Best Bet
item.description: A developer distilled Claude Opus 4.6's reasoning into a local Qwen model anyone can run. The result is Qwopus—and it's surprisingly close to the real thing.

item.title: Strategy’s Michael Saylor signals impending Bitcoin purchase
item.description: The company has completed 105 Bitcoin transactions since 2020 and is playing contrarian as it continues accumulating BTC via corporate debt and equity financing

item.title: 🚨 REKT: Bitcoin user G.Love lost 5.92 BTC after downloading a fake Ledger app from the Apple App Store, with funds quickly laundered through a CEX. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5FY1hpekRZN1FzWnIzUG9Fa1RYZmVybU53bWhjTkM3U2hQT3B2LVFEdXBxcE1JS3Fxd0NLLTl5bW50M3pqQjE1VU9yeHFvVUlqMWR5VUNDbE41T3RHQTVYR25kNFA?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 REKT: Bitcoin user G.Love lo…

item.title: Bitcoin may be forming a base at $65,000 as 'paper hands' have been flushed out
item.description: Jurrien Timmer, director of global macro at Fidelity Investments, says strong earnings are helping markets absorb geopolitical shocks, despite ongoing risks.

item.title: Oil futures up 7% on Hyperliquid as Trump orders Naval blockade of Hormuz
item.description: Oil prices spiked on the Hyperliquid platform after President Donald Trump ordered a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Market makers are fleeing public blockchains to protect their secret trading playbooks
item.description: Crypto trading is almost entirely public. One startup thinks it has borrowed an idea from Wall Street that could change that.

item.title: Bitcoin miners face a tougher road to the 2028 halving
item.description: Bitcoin miners are heading toward the 2028 halving with thinner margins, tighter power markets and a growing need for capital discipline.

item.title: Bitcoin slips below $71,000 as Trump orders U.S. to join Iran in blockade of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: "Effective immediately, the United States Navy ... will begin the process of blockading any and all ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz," said the president in a social media post.

item.title: Bitcoin analysts flag triggers for a massive surge to $88,000 even as war risks linger
item.description: Key factors, such as ETF flows, macro factors and on-chain supply favor a rally in bitcoin even as war risks linger.

item.title: There’s a Way to Make Bitcoin Safe From Quantum Without a Fork, Researchers Say
item.description: A new proposal suggests Bitcoin users could defend against future quantum attacks using a transaction design that works within the network’s existing rules.

item.title: Super PAC tied to Tether makes first ad buy from firm founded by Tether's U.S. CEO
item.description: The Fellowship PAC spent $300,000 with Nxum Group that was co-founded by Bo Hines, the chief of Tether's U.S. arm and former adviser to President Donald Trump.

item.title: Banks, corporates in Europe ‘actively selecting partners’ for stablecoin push
item.description: Stablecoin adoption in Europe is shifting from strategy to execution, with demand increasingly driven by real-world needs.

item.title: Commodity traders are getting debanked due to Iran war, pushing them to rely on stablecoins
item.description: As banks retreat from trade finance amid Iran-linked risk fears, non-bank lenders and traders are increasingly turning to stablecoins for settlement, according to Haycen’s Luke Sully.

item.title: US down to ‘last chance’ to pass CLARITY Act before 2030: Lummis
item.description: Crypto advocate Senator Cynthia Lummis said the country should not risk its financial future by further delaying the CLARITY Act.

item.title: Polymarket bets removed from Google News after brief appearance: Report
item.description: Polymarket links briefly appeared under mainstream outlets in Google News results for event-driven queries but were later removed.

item.title: quick history lesson: bitcoin logo was spotted in a 1991 game the lore goes deeper than you think - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTFBKQWJ5ZUt2Q3gtYjU5X2ozMEUxOWFSWjd4RHhfd2lZUWNPbW9fSWltZWRWdEFmcW9jaldVZW13UTNMTGZDQTM1Y0JPQnhvR2N0bGhqc0oxNUczY2xv?oc=5" target="_blank">quick history lesson: bitcoin logo was spo…

item.title: I have always been an ardent supporter of President Trump and his crypto friendly policy. As an early supporter who invested heavily in World Liberty Financial, I did so because I believed in the vision that was presented to the public: a decentralized finance pl - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin has been declared dead 472 times. If you invested $1,000 every time, you’d have over $75M today. - x.com

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $72,000 after Vice President JD Vance says the US failed to reach a deal with Iran during negotiations in Pakistan. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5wSFNZYmxsOG9UNDh1Nm0waXVlY1JlUzNXVFpLNGFGM0VmOU1nRllBbkc2a3pidXZUVEh0dHdQR0dDelZNWlFETUdhUVVaUVhiZ0NfYjVzd1NxWUhXX0M4TnJn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $72,0…

item.title: ⚡ INTERESTING: Bitcoin's whitepaper is on Wall Street. - x.com

item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBFclpSbnkzeW9JOGFydEE1NXRMLU4zajZXaWczMmZZOGd5SW9SQlFSdTB5dVd3eUZVOWpMV3NvOGhIc1NHNXplcjNXWEZVVnQxakJYbFo2LU1TSm1IeW1KQWliTWJrQW8?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin pumping ab…

item.title: I am a Web3 Ambassador at World Liberty Financial. There are 12 of us on the team page. 4 are named Trump. 3 are named Witkoff. The page calls us "the passionate minds shaping the future of finance." 600,000 wallets bought our memecoin. They lost $3.87 - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin got us to $126,000. So now we feel terrible at $72,000. But here's the thing — you own Bitcoin. I owned one Bitcoin before the rally. I owned one Bitcoin during the bear market. Same Bitcoin. Different feelings. The asset didn't change. The price did. Not - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE91OGNWdUhzV0xzOWZENTZObTZVMGI2WUFKNnA1OXFKVzNCWjRxS1B5SFd2TlZ2OGcwYUVmRVpPaFdOZXFQbmp6R24wN1o4ekF4NkNZZ2NzelhxdkxyQUo1Sw?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin got us to $126,000. So now w…

item.title: 'Not Going to Stop at Bitcoin': Morgan Stanley Weighs Tokenization, Tax Solutions in Crypto Push
item.description: Morgan Stanley’s Amy Oldenburg signaled that the Wall Street giant’s crypto journey has a long way to go.

item.title: New Tools Aim to Make AI 'Vibe Coding' Safer for Crypto
item.description: A new initiative by Matterhorn and the ASI Alliance adds auditing tools and safety checks for AI-generated smart contracts.

item.title: Economists Said AI Wouldn’t Take Jobs—Some Now Admit They Got It Wrong
item.description: A new multi-university study surveyed 69 economists, 52 AI experts, and 38 superforecasters. All three groups agree: faster AI means fewer jobs.

item.title: Ethereum is the center of crypto capital. Applications on @ethereum hold ~$310B in user deposits. A chart to follow 👇 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFAxdUFzcVlqNEptai1ZakhnUTMyeTBkM1dUTVl4QW5xTUFjRGZBU0txRmdtQ1FCUVNGRU1HMW13VWQzOHdzS3ppck5ZZHBSMGRHMDl4UlVJQnNFNE9KYlRKUDlhMi0?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum is the center of crypt…
